descricao: Monte um cronometro com mostrador circular, tempo em destaque, barra de progresso e botoes de controle.
cod:
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(title: Text('Cronometro'), backgroundColor: Colors.indigo),
  body: Column(
    mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
    children: [
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      Container(
        width: 150,
        height: 150,
        alignment: Alignment.center,
        decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.indigo, shape: BoxShape.circle),
        child: Text(
          '00:45',
          style: TextStyle(fontSize: 42, color: Colors.white, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold),
        ),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 16),
      Text('Tempo restante', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 14, color: Colors.grey)),
      SizedBox(height: 10),
      LinearProgressIndicator(value: 0.75),
      SizedBox(height: 20),
      Wrap(
        spacing: 12,
        children: [
          OutlinedButton(onPressed: () {}, child: Text('Zerar')),
          ElevatedButton(onPressed: () {}, child: Text('Iniciar')),
        ],
      ),
    ],
  ),
)
out: Cronometro com mostrador circular indigo marcando 00:45, o texto Tempo restante, uma barra de progresso em 75% e os botoes Zerar e Iniciar.

descricao: Lista de afazeres com caixas de selecao, barra de progresso e botao de adicionar.
cod:
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(title: Text('Minhas Tarefas'), backgroundColor: Colors.teal),
  body: Column(
    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
    children: [
      Text('Progresso do dia', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 13, color: Colors.grey)),
      SizedBox(height: 6),
      Row(
        children: [
          Text('3 de 5', style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.w700, color: Colors.teal)),
          SizedBox(width: 12),
          LinearProgressIndicator(value: 0.6),
        ],
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 12),
      Card(child: ListTile(leading: Checkbox(value: true), title: Text('Estudar Dart e Flutter'), trailing: Icon(Icons.check, color: Colors.green))),
      Card(child: ListTile(leading: Checkbox(value: true), title: Text('Praticar widgets'), trailing: Icon(Icons.check, color: Colors.green))),
      Card(child: ListTile(leading: Checkbox(value: false), title: Text('Montar o layout do app'), trailing: Icon(Icons.delete, color: Colors.grey))),
      Card(child: ListTile(leading: Checkbox(value: false), title: Text('Publicar na loja'), trailing: Icon(Icons.delete, color: Colors.grey))),
    ],
  ),
  floatingActionButton: FloatingActionButton(child: Icon(Icons.add)),
)
out: Uma tela de tarefas: cabecalho com o progresso do dia (3 de 5) e uma barra, quatro cartoes de tarefa com caixa de selecao, titulo e icone (check nas feitas, lixeira nas pendentes) e um botao flutuante de adicionar.

descricao: Objetivo de economia com anel de progresso circular.
cod:
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(title: Text('Minha Meta'), backgroundColor: Colors.indigo),
  body: Center(
    child: Column(
      mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
      children: [
        Text('Economia para viagem', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
        SizedBox(height: 6),
        Text('Praia dos Sonhos', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey)),
        SizedBox(height: 28),
        Stack(
          alignment: Alignment.center,
          children: [
            SizedBox(
              width: 170,
              height: 170,
              child: CircularProgressIndicator(value: 0.68, color: Colors.indigo),
            ),
            Column(
              children: [
                Text('68%', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 40, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
                Text('concluido', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey)),
              ],
            ),
          ],
        ),
        SizedBox(height: 28),
        Text('R\$ 3.400 de R\$ 5.000', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 16, color: Colors.grey)),
        SizedBox(height: 20),
        ElevatedButton(
          onPressed: null,
          child: Text('Adicionar deposito'),
        ),
      ],
    ),
  ),
)
out: Anel de progresso circular em 68% com o valor no centro, texto de R$ 3.400 de R$ 5.000 e botao de adicionar deposito.

descricao: Tela de cadastro com campos, aceite de termos e botão
cod:
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(
    title: Text('Criar Conta'),
    backgroundColor: Colors.indigo,
  ),
  body: Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(20),
    child: Column(
      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
      children: [
        Center(
          child: CircleAvatar(
            radius: 36,
            backgroundColor: Colors.indigo.shade100,
            child: Icon(Icons.person_add, size: 38, color: Colors.indigo),
          ),
        ),
        SizedBox(height: 22),
        TextField(decoration: InputDecoration(labelText: 'Nome completo', border: OutlineInputBorder())),
        SizedBox(height: 14),
        TextField(decoration: InputDecoration(labelText: 'E-mail', border: OutlineInputBorder())),
        SizedBox(height: 14),
        TextField(decoration: InputDecoration(labelText: 'Senha', border: OutlineInputBorder())),
        SizedBox(height: 6),
        Row(
          children: [
            Checkbox(value: true, onChanged: (v) {}),
            Expanded(child: Text('Aceito os termos de uso e privacidade')),
          ],
        ),
        SizedBox(height: 6),
        ElevatedButton(
          onPressed: () {},
          child: Padding(
            padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),
            child: Text('CADASTRAR', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 16, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
          ),
        ),
      ],
    ),
  ),
)
out: Formulário com avatar, campos de nome, e-mail e senha, checkbox de termos e botão CADASTRAR.

descricao: Crie um quiz visual com pergunta, barra de progresso e quatro alternativas, destacando a correta.
cod:
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(title: Text('Quiz de Geografia'), backgroundColor: Colors.teal),
  body: Column(
    children: [
      SizedBox(height: 4),
      Text('Pergunta 2 de 5', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 13, color: Colors.grey)),
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      LinearProgressIndicator(value: 0.4),
      SizedBox(height: 14),
      Text('Qual e a capital do Brasil?', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 18, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
      SizedBox(height: 14),
      Card(
        child: ListTile(
          leading: CircleAvatar(radius: 14, backgroundColor: Colors.grey, child: Text('A')),
          title: Text('Sao Paulo'),
        ),
      ),
      Card(
        color: Colors.green,
        child: ListTile(
          leading: CircleAvatar(radius: 14, backgroundColor: Colors.white, child: Text('B')),
          title: Text('Brasilia', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
          trailing: Icon(Icons.check, color: Colors.white),
        ),
      ),
      Card(
        child: ListTile(
          leading: CircleAvatar(radius: 14, backgroundColor: Colors.grey, child: Text('C')),
          title: Text('Rio de Janeiro'),
        ),
      ),
      Card(
        child: ListTile(
          leading: CircleAvatar(radius: 14, backgroundColor: Colors.grey, child: Text('D')),
          title: Text('Salvador'),
        ),
      ),
    ],
  ),
)
out: Tela de quiz com Pergunta 2 de 5, barra de progresso, a pergunta sobre a capital do Brasil e quatro alternativas de A a D, com Brasilia destacada em verde como a correta.

descricao: Cartão de contato com dados da empresa e ações
cod:
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(
    title: Text('Perfil da Empresa'),
    backgroundColor: Colors.teal,
  ),
  body: Column(
    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
    children: [
      Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(24),
        color: Colors.teal,
        child: Column(
          children: [
            CircleAvatar(radius: 40, backgroundColor: Colors.white, child: Icon(Icons.storefront, size: 44, color: Colors.teal)),
            SizedBox(height: 12),
            Text('TechNova Soluções', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 22, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: Colors.white)),
            Text('Tecnologia e Inovação', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white70)),
          ],
        ),
      ),
      ListTile(
        leading: Icon(Icons.phone, color: Colors.teal),
        title: Text('(11) 4002-8922'),
      ),
      ListTile(
        leading: Icon(Icons.email, color: Colors.teal),
        title: Text('contato@technova.com'),
      ),
      ListTile(
        leading: Icon(Icons.location_on, color: Colors.teal),
        title: Text('Av. Paulista, 1000 - São Paulo'),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 16),
      Row(
        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceEvenly,
        children: [
          ElevatedButton(onPressed: () {}, child: Text('Ligar')),
          OutlinedButton(onPressed: () {}, child: Text('Site')),
        ],
      ),
    ],
  ),
)
out: Banner com logo e nome da empresa, lista de contatos (telefone, e-mail e endereço) e botões Ligar e Site.

descricao: Card de ingresso com cabecalho, data, assento e QR code.
cod:
Center(
  child: Container(
    width: 300,
    decoration: BoxDecoration(
      color: Colors.white,
      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(20),
      boxShadow: [BoxShadow(color: Colors.black26, blurRadius: 12)],
    ),
    child: ClipRRect(
      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(20),
      child: Column(
        children: [
          Container(
            width: double.infinity,
            padding: EdgeInsets.all(22),
            color: Colors.teal,
            child: Column(
              children: [
                Icon(Icons.music_note, color: Colors.white, size: 44),
                SizedBox(height: 10),
                Text('Festival de Verao', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 22, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
              ],
            ),
          ),
          ListTile(
            leading: Icon(Icons.calendar_today, color: Colors.teal),
            title: Text('15 de Marco, 2026'),
            subtitle: Text('Abertura as 20:00'),
          ),
          ListTile(
            leading: Icon(Icons.event_seat, color: Colors.teal),
            title: Text('Setor A - Fila 12'),
            subtitle: Text('Assento 34'),
          ),
          Container(
            width: double.infinity,
            padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
            color: Colors.grey.shade100,
            child: Icon(Icons.qr_code_2, size: 70),
          ),
        ],
      ),
    ),
  ),
)
out: Ingresso centralizado com cabecalho teal e icone de musica, seguido de data, setor/assento e um QR code na base.

descricao: Progresso do curso e lista de módulos/aulas
cod:
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(
    title: Text('Flutter do Zero'),
    backgroundColor: Colors.deepPurple,
  ),
  body: Column(
    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
    children: [
      Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(18),
        color: Colors.deepPurple.shade50,
        child: Column(
          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
          children: [
            Text('Seu progresso', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 16, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
            SizedBox(height: 10),
            LinearProgressIndicator(value: 0.65, color: Colors.deepPurple),
            Text('65% concluído - 13 de 20 aulas', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey.shade700)),
          ],
        ),
      ),
      ListTile(
        leading: Icon(Icons.check_circle, color: Colors.green, size: 30),
        title: Text('1. Introdução ao Flutter'),
        subtitle: Text('Concluído'),
      ),
      ListTile(
        leading: Icon(Icons.check_circle, color: Colors.green, size: 30),
        title: Text('2. Widgets Básicos'),
        subtitle: Text('Concluído'),
      ),
      ListTile(
        leading: Icon(Icons.play_circle_fill, color: Colors.deepPurple, size: 30),
        title: Text('3. Layouts e Listas'),
        subtitle: Text('Em andamento'),
      ),
      ListTile(
        leading: Icon(Icons.lock, color: Colors.grey, size: 30),
        title: Text('4. Navegação'),
        subtitle: Text('Bloqueado'),
      ),
    ],
  ),
)
out: Barra de progresso em 65% e lista de aulas com status concluído, em andamento e bloqueado.

descricao: Nota geral com estrelas e comentários de clientes
cod:
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(
    title: Text('Avaliações'),
    backgroundColor: Colors.amber.shade700,
  ),
  body: Column(
    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
    children: [
      Container(
        color: Colors.amber.shade50,
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(18),
        child: Column(
          children: [
            Text('4.8', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 46, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: Colors.amber.shade800)),
            Row(
              children: [
                Icon(Icons.star, color: Colors.amber),
                Icon(Icons.star, color: Colors.amber),
                Icon(Icons.star, color: Colors.amber),
                Icon(Icons.star, color: Colors.amber),
                Icon(Icons.star_half, color: Colors.amber),
              ],
            ),
            Text('214 avaliações', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey)),
          ],
        ),
      ),
      Card(
        child: ListTile(
          leading: CircleAvatar(backgroundColor: Colors.blue, child: Text('AC', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white))),
          title: Text('Ana Costa'),
          subtitle: Text('Produto excelente, chegou antes do prazo!'),
        ),
      ),
      Card(
        child: ListTile(
          leading: CircleAvatar(backgroundColor: Colors.green, child: Text('RS', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white))),
          title: Text('Rafael Souza'),
          subtitle: Text('Muito bom, recomendo a todos!'),
        ),
      ),
    ],
  ),
)
out: Cabeçalho com nota 4.8 e cinco estrelas, seguido de cards de avaliações com avatar, nome e comentário.

descricao: Tela de configuracoes em cards: perfil, switches de notificacoes e modo escuro, idioma e sair.
cod:
Scaffold(
  backgroundColor: Colors.grey.shade100,
  appBar: AppBar(title: Text('Configuracoes'), backgroundColor: Colors.teal),
  body: Column(
    children: [
      Card(
        child: ListTile(
          leading: CircleAvatar(radius: 26, backgroundColor: Colors.teal, child: Icon(Icons.person, color: Colors.white)),
          title: Text('Ana Ribeiro', style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
          subtitle: Text('ana.ribeiro@email.com'),
          trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
        ),
      ),
      Card(
        child: Column(
          children: [
            ListTile(
              leading: Icon(Icons.notifications, color: Colors.teal),
              title: Text('Notificacoes'),
              trailing: Switch(value: true, onChanged: (v) {}),
            ),
            Divider(),
            ListTile(
              leading: Icon(Icons.dark_mode, color: Colors.teal),
              title: Text('Modo escuro'),
              trailing: Switch(value: false, onChanged: (v) {}),
            ),
            Divider(),
            ListTile(
              leading: Icon(Icons.language, color: Colors.teal),
              title: Text('Idioma'),
              trailing: Text('Portugues', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey)),
            ),
          ],
        ),
      ),
      Card(
        child: ListTile(
          leading: Icon(Icons.logout, color: Colors.red),
          title: Text('Sair da conta', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.red)),
        ),
      ),
    ],
  ),
)
out: Lista de ajustes agrupada em cards: card de perfil com avatar teal, card com switches de Notificacoes (ligado) e Modo escuro (desligado) mais Idioma, e card Sair da conta em vermelho.

descricao: Lista de filmes em cards com avatar, genero, duracao e nota.
cod:
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(
    title: Text('Filmes em Cartaz'),
    backgroundColor: Colors.black87,
  ),
  body: Column(
    children: [
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      Card(
        margin: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 6),
        child: ListTile(
          leading: CircleAvatar(radius: 26, backgroundColor: Colors.indigo, child: Icon(Icons.movie, color: Colors.white)),
          title: Text('Interestelar', style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16)),
          subtitle: Text('Ficcao Cientifica - 2h49'),
          trailing: Chip(label: Text('8.6')),
        ),
      ),
      Card(
        margin: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 6),
        child: ListTile(
          leading: CircleAvatar(radius: 26, backgroundColor: Colors.redAccent, child: Icon(Icons.local_fire_department, color: Colors.white)),
          title: Text('Duna: Parte 2', style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16)),
          subtitle: Text('Aventura - 2h46'),
          trailing: Chip(label: Text('8.1')),
        ),
      ),
      Card(
        margin: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 6),
        child: ListTile(
          leading: CircleAvatar(radius: 26, backgroundColor: Colors.teal, child: Icon(Icons.rocket_launch, color: Colors.white)),
          title: Text('Gravidade', style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16)),
          subtitle: Text('Suspense - 1h31'),
          trailing: Chip(label: Text('7.7')),
        ),
      ),
    ],
  ),
)
out: Tres cards de filmes, cada um com avatar circular, titulo em negrito, genero/duracao e um chip com a nota.

descricao: Cardápio com categorias em chips e itens com preço
cod:
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(
    title: Text('Cardápio'),
    backgroundColor: Colors.red.shade700,
    actions: [
      IconButton(onPressed: () {}, icon: Icon(Icons.shopping_cart)),
    ],
  ),
  body: Column(
    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
    children: [
      Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),
        child: Wrap(
          spacing: 8,
          children: [
            Chip(label: Text('Lanches'), backgroundColor: Colors.red.shade100),
            Chip(label: Text('Pizzas')),
            Chip(label: Text('Bebidas')),
            Chip(label: Text('Sobremesas')),
          ],
        ),
      ),
      ListTile(
        leading: Icon(Icons.lunch_dining, color: Colors.red, size: 34),
        title: Text('X-Burger Especial'),
        subtitle: Text('Pão, carne, queijo e bacon'),
        trailing: Text('R\$ 24,90', style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: Colors.green)),
      ),
      ListTile(
        leading: Icon(Icons.local_pizza, color: Colors.red, size: 34),
        title: Text('Pizza Margherita'),
        subtitle: Text('Molho, mussarela e manjericão'),
        trailing: Text('R\$ 39,90', style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: Colors.green)),
      ),
      ListTile(
        leading: Icon(Icons.local_drink, color: Colors.red, size: 34),
        title: Text('Refrigerante Lata'),
        subtitle: Text('350ml gelado'),
        trailing: Text('R\$ 6,00', style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: Colors.green)),
      ),
    ],
  ),
)
out: Chips de categorias e lista de pratos com ícone, descrição e preço em destaque.

descricao: Tela de login completa com campos de e-mail e senha, botao de entrar e link de recuperacao.
cod:
Scaffold(
  backgroundColor: Colors.indigo.shade50,
  body: Center(
    child: Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(24),
      child: Column(
        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
        children: [
          Icon(Icons.lock_outline, size: 72, color: Colors.indigo),
          SizedBox(height: 16),
          Text(
            'Bem-vindo de volta',
            style: TextStyle(fontSize: 26, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold),
          ),
          SizedBox(height: 8),
          Text(
            'Entre com sua conta',
            style: TextStyle(fontSize: 15, color: Colors.grey),
          ),
          SizedBox(height: 32),
          TextField(
            decoration: InputDecoration(
              labelText: 'E-mail',
              prefixIcon: Icon(Icons.email),
              border: OutlineInputBorder(),
            ),
          ),
          SizedBox(height: 16),
          TextField(
            obscureText: true,
            decoration: InputDecoration(
              labelText: 'Senha',
              prefixIcon: Icon(Icons.lock),
              border: OutlineInputBorder(),
            ),
          ),
          SizedBox(height: 24),
          SizedBox(
            width: double.infinity,
            height: 50,
            child: ElevatedButton(
              onPressed: () {},
              child: Text('ENTRAR'),
            ),
          ),
          SizedBox(height: 12),
          TextButton(
            onPressed: () {},
            child: Text('Esqueceu a senha?'),
          ),
        ],
      ),
    ),
  ),
)
out: Mostra uma tela de autenticacao centralizada: icone de cadeado, titulo de boas-vindas, campo de e-mail com icone, campo de senha oculta, botao ENTRAR de largura total e o link 'Esqueceu a senha?'.

descricao: Construa um rastreamento de pedido com cartao de status e uma linha do tempo de etapas.
cod:
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(title: Text('Pedido 1234'), backgroundColor: Colors.indigo),
  body: Column(
    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
    children: [
      Card(
        color: Colors.indigo,
        child: Column(
          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
          children: [
            Text('A caminho', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: Colors.white)),
            SizedBox(height: 4),
            Text('Chega hoje ate as 18h', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 13, color: Colors.white)),
          ],
        ),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 10),
      LinearProgressIndicator(value: 0.7),
      SizedBox(height: 12),
      ListTile(
        leading: CircleAvatar(radius: 14, backgroundColor: Colors.green, child: Icon(Icons.check, size: 16, color: Colors.white)),
        title: Text('Pedido confirmado'),
        subtitle: Text('Seg, 10:24'),
      ),
      ListTile(
        leading: CircleAvatar(radius: 14, backgroundColor: Colors.green, child: Icon(Icons.check, size: 16, color: Colors.white)),
        title: Text('Pedido enviado'),
        subtitle: Text('Ter, 09:10'),
      ),
      ListTile(
        leading: CircleAvatar(radius: 14, backgroundColor: Colors.indigo, child: Icon(Icons.arrow_forward, size: 16, color: Colors.white)),
        title: Text('Saiu para entrega'),
        subtitle: Text('Hoje, 08:00'),
      ),
      ListTile(
        leading: CircleAvatar(radius: 14, backgroundColor: Colors.grey, child: Icon(Icons.home, size: 16, color: Colors.white)),
        title: Text('Entregue'),
        subtitle: Text('Aguardando'),
      ),
    ],
  ),
)
out: Rastreamento do Pedido 1234 com cartao de status A caminho, barra de progresso e uma linha do tempo de etapas: confirmado, enviado, saiu para entrega e entregue.

descricao: Monte uma tela de receita com banner, chips de informacao, lista de ingredientes e passos numerados.
cod:
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(title: Text('Bolo de Cenoura'), backgroundColor: Colors.orange),
  body: Column(
    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
    children: [
      Container(
        width: 168,
        height: 76,
        alignment: Alignment.center,
        decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.orange, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)),
        child: Icon(Icons.star, size: 38, color: Colors.white),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 10),
      Wrap(
        spacing: 8,
        children: [
          Chip(label: Text('40 min')),
          Chip(label: Text('8 fatias')),
          Chip(label: Text('Facil')),
        ],
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 12),
      Text('Ingredientes', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 17, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: Colors.orange)),
      ListTile(leading: Icon(Icons.check, color: Colors.green), title: Text('2 xicaras de farinha')),
      ListTile(leading: Icon(Icons.check, color: Colors.green), title: Text('3 cenouras medias')),
      ListTile(leading: Icon(Icons.check, color: Colors.green), title: Text('1 xicara de acucar')),
      Divider(),
      Text('Modo de preparo', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 17, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: Colors.orange)),
      ListTile(leading: CircleAvatar(radius: 13, backgroundColor: Colors.orange, child: Text('1')), title: Text('Bata os ovos com a cenoura')),
      ListTile(leading: CircleAvatar(radius: 13, backgroundColor: Colors.orange, child: Text('2')), title: Text('Misture a farinha e o acucar')),
      ListTile(leading: CircleAvatar(radius: 13, backgroundColor: Colors.orange, child: Text('3')), title: Text('Asse por 40 minutos')),
    ],
  ),
)
out: Receita de Bolo de Cenoura: banner laranja, chips de tempo e porcoes, lista de ingredientes com check verde e o modo de preparo em passos numerados.

descricao: Feed de noticias com chips de categoria, materia em destaque com imagem e item de lista.

descricao: Carteira com cartao de saldo e lista de transacoes recentes.

          children: [

descricao: Interface de player com capa, titulo da faixa, barra de progresso e controles de reproducao.
cod:
Scaffold(
  backgroundColor: Colors.deepPurple.shade900,
  appBar: AppBar(
    backgroundColor: Colors.transparent,
    elevation: 0,
    leading: Icon(Icons.keyboard_arrow_down),
    title: Text('Tocando agora'),
    centerTitle: true,
  ),
  body: Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(24),
    child: Column(
      mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
      children: [
        Container(
          width: 240,
          height: 240,
          decoration: BoxDecoration(
            color: Colors.deepPurple.shade400,
            borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(20),
          ),
          child: Icon(Icons.music_note, size: 120, color: Colors.white),
        ),
        SizedBox(height: 32),
        Text('Horizonte Azul', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 24, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: Colors.white)),
        SizedBox(height: 8),
        Text('Banda Aurora', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 16, color: Colors.white70)),
        SizedBox(height: 24),
        Slider(value: 0.4, onChanged: (v) {}, activeColor: Colors.white),
        Row(
          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
          children: [
            Text('1:24', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white70)),
            Text('3:45', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white70)),
          ],
        ),
        SizedBox(height: 16),
        Row(
          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceEvenly,
          children: [
            Icon(Icons.shuffle, color: Colors.white70),
            Icon(Icons.skip_previous, size: 40, color: Colors.white),
            CircleAvatar(
              radius: 32,
              backgroundColor: Colors.white,
              child: Icon(Icons.play_arrow, size: 40, color: Colors.deepPurple),
            ),
            Icon(Icons.skip_next, size: 40, color: Colors.white),
            Icon(Icons.repeat, color: Colors.white70),
          ],
        ),
      ],
    ),
  ),
)
out: Tela roxa escura de reproducao: capa quadrada com nota musical, titulo 'Horizonte Azul' e artista, barra de progresso com tempos 1:24/3:45 e os controles shuffle, anterior, play, proximo e repetir.

descricao: Carrinho de compras com itens, subtotal por produto, total e botao de finalizar.
cod:
Scaffold(

    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

        children: [

          SizedBox(width: 10),
          Text('3 itens no carrinho', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 14, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600)),
        ],
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 10),
      Card(child: ListTile(leading: Container(width: 46, height: 46, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.blue, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10)), child: Icon(Icons.image, color: Colors.white)), title: Text('Fone Bluetooth'), subtitle: Text('R\$ 129,90'), trailing: Text('x1', style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.w700)))),
      Card(child: ListTile(leading: Container(width: 46, height: 46, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.teal, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10)), child: Icon(Icons.camera, color: Colors.white)), title: Text('Camera Web HD'), subtitle: Text('R\$ 89,90'), trailing: Text('x1', style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.w700)))),
      Card(child: ListTile(leading: Container(width: 46, height: 46, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.deepOrange, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10)), child: Icon(Icons.favorite, color: Colors.white)), title: Text('Teclado Mecanico'), subtitle: Text('R\$ 69,90'), trailing: Text('x1', style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.w700)))),
      Divider(),
      ListTile(title: Text('Total', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 16, fontWeight: FontWeight.w700)), trailing: Text('R\$ 289,70', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 16, fontWeight: FontWeight.w700, color: Colors.green))),
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      SizedBox(width: 220, child: ElevatedButton(child: Text('Finalizar compra'))),
    ],

)
out: Um carrinho de compras: cabecalho com icone e contador (badge), tres cartoes de produto (miniatura colorida, nome, preco e quantidade), o total em destaque e um botao largo de finalizar compra.

          Container(width: 106, height: 104, padding: EdgeInsets.all(12), decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.green, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16)), child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [Icon(Icons.shopping_cart, color: Colors.white), SizedBox(height: 8), Text('8.2k', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 22, fontWeight: FontWeight.w700)), Text('Vendas', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 12))])),
          Container(width: 106, height: 104, padding: EdgeInsets.all(12), decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.purple, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16)), child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [Icon(Icons.favorite, color: Colors.white), SizedBox(height: 8), Text('980', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 22, fontWeight: FontWeight.w700)), Text('Curtidas', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 12))])),
          Container(width: 106, height: 104, padding: EdgeInsets.all(12), decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.orange, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16)), child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [Icon(Icons.star, color: Colors.white), SizedBox(height: 8), Text('4.9', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 22, fontWeight: FontWeight.w700)), Text('Avaliacao', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 12))])),
        ],
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 16),
      Text('Atividade recente', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 15, fontWeight: FontWeight.w700)),
      SizedBox(height: 4),
      ListTile(leading: CircleAvatar(backgroundColor: Colors.blue, child: Icon(Icons.person, color: Colors.white, size: 18)), title: Text('Novo seguidor'), subtitle: Text('ha 2 minutos'), trailing: Icon(Icons.arrow_forward, color: Colors.grey)),
      ListTile(leading: CircleAvatar(backgroundColor: Colors.green, child: Icon(Icons.shopping_cart, color: Colors.white, size: 18)), title: Text('Pedido 482 pago'), subtitle: Text('ha 20 minutos'), trailing: Icon(Icons.arrow_forward, color: Colors.grey)),
    ],
  ),
)
out: Um painel/dashboard: saudacao no topo, quatro cartoes coloridos de metricas (usuarios, vendas, curtidas, avaliacao) numa grade 2x2 com icone, numero e rotulo, e uma lista de atividade recente com avatares coloridos.

descricao: Uma calculadora com visor e teclado numerico, montada so com widgets do Flutter.
cod:
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(title: Text('Calculadora'), backgroundColor: Colors.blueGrey),
  body: Column(
    children: [
      Container(
        width: 220,
        height: 92,
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),
        alignment: Alignment.bottomRight,
        decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.black, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16)),
        child: Column(
          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.end,
          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.end,
          children: [
            Text('128 + 56', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 15)),
            Text('184', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 34, fontWeight: FontWeight.w700)),
          ],
        ),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 14),
      Wrap(
        spacing: 8,
        runSpacing: 8,
        children: [
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.blueGrey, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('7', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.blueGrey, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('8', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.blueGrey, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('9', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.orange, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('/', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.blueGrey, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('4', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.blueGrey, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('5', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.blueGrey, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('6', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.orange, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('*', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.blueGrey, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('1', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.blueGrey, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('2', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.blueGrey, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('3', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.orange, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('-', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.blueGrey, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('0', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.blueGrey, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('.', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.green, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('=', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          Container(width: 48, height: 48, alignment: Alignment.center, decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.orange, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14)), child: Text('+', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
        ],
      ),
    ],
  ),
)
out: Mostra uma calculadora completa: visor escuro com a conta e o resultado em destaque, e um teclado de 16 teclas arredondadas (numeros em cinza, operacoes em laranja e o igual em verde).
